entries.description: Add support for multi-region replication, enabling synchronization of user data and configurations to a secondary user pool in a standby Region. Add support for customer managed keys (CMK) in AWS KMS for encrypting user pool data at rest.

This release adds public APIs for Amazon QuickSight Spaces, Agents, and Flows. Spaces APIs enable management of curated resource collections. Agents APIs provide lifecycle control over AI-powered agents that leverage Spaces. Flows APIs add CRUDL APIs for automated workflows.
Increase code coverage on dynamodb-enhanced module

This update replaces the default `apache-client` runtime dependency of service clients with the new `apache5-client`. This means that service clients will now use the `Apache5HttpClient` by default if no HTTP client is explicitly configured on the service client builder.
 Notable changes:
 - Apache 5 uses different logger names than Apache 4
 - Expect: 100-Continue is disabled by default
 - TCP keep-alive socket options require `jdk.net.NetworkPermission` when SecurityManager is active
